The '''Model RDP-12 Rocket Launcher''' was a model of [[Missile launcher/Legends|rocket launcher]] designed by [[Locris Syndicates/Legends|Locris Syndicates]]. Designated as a portable self-propelled rocket delivery system, the RDP-12 could be loaded with either [[Type-12A Anti-Personnel Rocket]]s or [[Type-12B Hollow-Tip Rocket]]s respectively; with the launcher capable of using either an internal magazine of 4 rockets or an external magazine of 20 rockets. A weapon with a moderate rate of fire, the launcher fired micro rockets; a burst fired rocket in comparison to a study burn rocket, which inflicted not only kinetic damage on impact, but also a small one meter explosion (Incendiary or gas respectively).

==Behind the scenes==
''[[Gundark's Fantastic Technology: Personal Gear]]'' misspells the launcher as the "RPD-12."
